briefs.title: Council to vote on $5.75M contract for Burnaby fire station infrastructure upgrades
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a $5.75 million contract to Holaco Construction (1997) Ltd. to upgrade fuel storage and emergency power systems at two Burnaby fire stations. The work would replace aging underground fuel tanks and old generators with modern, safer equipment while fire stations stay fully operational.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — construction activity near Fire Stations No. 1 and No. 2 may affect nearby businesses.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — Emergency Facilities Infrastructure Upgrades contract award
Burnaby 2026–2030 Financial Plan approval — funding for this project
